description_long: This object is a stylized representation of a university building, specifically referencing Universitas Trisakti, as indicated by the raised text signage on the uppermost horizontal band. The structure is composed of a series of stacked, rectangular, slab-like layers with pronounced overhangs, creating a tiered, modernist appearance. The base is supported by several short, cylindrical columns, and the lower section features a slightly protruding octagonal platform. The color scheme is predominantly white with subtle gray and beige accents, giving it a clean, institutional look. The overall form is geometric and symmetrical, with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing a monumental, abstracted architectural style. The only visible signage is the university name, and there are no landscaping features or entryway details present.
description: A modern, tiered white building with stacked horizontal layers and the name 'UNIVERSITAS TRISAKTI' inscribed on the top band. The structure is geometric, symmetrical, and supported by short columns at the base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'UNIVERSITAS TRISAKTI' signage clearly on the top band, with the layered horizontal slabs and supporting columns visible.
description_view_1: Similar to view 0, but the signage is slightly less prominent due to the angle; the stacked layers and base columns remain visible.
description_view_2: Side view with the 'UNIVERSITAS TRISAKTI' signage partially visible and a small blue 'M' on one of the lower layers; the tiered structure is emphasized.
description_view_3: Rear view with the signage still visible but less distinct; the layered construction and base columns are consistent with other views.
attribute_building_signage: Raised white text 'UNIVERSITAS TRISAKTI' on the uppermost horizontal band, sans-serif style.
attribute_entryway_design: No visible entryway; the structure does not display any doors or entry features in the provided views.
